scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && cd flutter_client && flutter pub get
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SERVER,FLUTTER" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix server" "cd flutter_client && flutter run -d chrome --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3000"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && cd flutter_client && flutter build web --no-web-resources-cdn --no-wasm-dry-run
scripts.test: npm run build --prefix server && cd flutter_client && flutter analyze && flutter test
